_doc: Raven Hollow auction house + bank seed (BACKLOG #72). Consumed by AuctionSystem (scripts/systems/auction_system.gd). Since there is no multiplayer, the browse grid is populated from 'seed_listings' (AI/seed sellers) alongside anything the player lists from their InventorySystem bag. Material ids/names/rarities mirror data/crafting.json; gear mirrors data/items.json. 'bank' holds the banker config (deposit/withdraw gold + item storage tabs). Prices are in gold (actor.gold).

item.name: Bog-Iron Lump
item.flavor: River-smelted. Ugly work, honest metal.

item.name: Slag Iron
item.flavor: The forge's leavings. Still has a temper.

item.name: Cold-Iron Shard
item.flavor: It never rings. Cold-forged, cold-kept.

item.name: Bone
item.flavor: Dry, light, patient.

item.name: Ember Dust
item.flavor: Warm, but honest warmth.

item.name: Wolf Pelt
item.flavor: The pack howled; someone wore the pack.

item.name: Raven Feather
item.flavor: The hollow watches back.

item.name: Thread-Filament
item.flavor: Pulled from where the Iele stand too still.

item.name: Cedar Shavings
item.flavor: He never says what they are for.

item.name: Ashvent Salt
item.flavor: Scraped from a vent warm for the wrong reason.

item.name: Wyrm Sinew
item.flavor: Finest goods this side of the old road.

item.name: Iron Shortsword
item.flavor: Plain, honest, and sharp enough.

item.name: Warhammer
item.flavor: Swung by the arm and the shoulder both.

item.name: Vasca's Second Knife
item.flavor: The one she keeps for after the handshake.

item.name: Boiled Leather Vest
item.flavor: Hardened in a tanner's pot behind the fords.

item.name: Ringmail Vest
item.flavor: Each ring closed by a smith who is dead now.

item.name: Scout Boots
item.flavor: Cut soft so the watch never heard them.

item.name: Fasting-Cord Cinch
item.flavor: Knotted once for each meal refused.

item.name: Raven-Feather Charm
item.flavor: The hollow watches back.

item.name: The Bent Oar's Luck
item.flavor: The tavern that floated when the quarter drowned.

item.name: Iron Signet
item.flavor: A crest worn smooth past reading.

bank.name: Bank of the Long Vigil
bank.greeting: Your gold sleeps cold and counted here. Withdraw what the road needs.
